task.name: cost-estimate

metadata.description: Generate a detailed cost estimate for an episode based on its Scene Specification Document (SSD) and pricing configuration.

input.name: ssd
input.description: Scene Specification Document containing all scene definitions, tool assignments, and parameters.

input.name: pricing
input.description: Pricing table with per-call costs for each tool at each resolution/quality tier.

input.name: global_config
input.description: Global configuration containing retake_budget_percent and other defaults.

output.description: Structured cost estimate with per-scene breakdown, tool totals, retake buffer, and resolution alternatives.

step.name: Parse SSD
step.description: Parse the Scene Specification Document and extract all scenes with their tool configurations.

actions.action: Read and parse episodes/{episode_id}/ssd/scene-spec.yaml
Extract the full list of scenes from the scenes[] array

For each scene, identify: - scene_id - tool (veo, imagen, chirp, nano-banana, elevenlabs, playwright, etc.) - model variant and speed setting - resolution / quality tier - duration (for video tools) - number of expected API calls (clips, frames, audio segments) - input_mode (text-to-video, image-to-video, interpolation)
Build a scene manifest: list of {scene_id, tool, model, speed, resolution, duration, call_count}

step.name: Load Pricing
step.description: Load and index the pricing configuration.

actions.action: Read _config/pricing.yaml
Build a lookup table: pricing[tool][model][speed][resolution] -> cost_per_call or cost_per_second
Validate that every tool referenced in the SSD has a corresponding pricing entry
If a tool/model combination is missing from pricing, flag as WARNING and use $0.00 with annotation

step.name: Load Global Config
step.description: Load the global configuration for retake budget and defaults.

actions.action: Read _config/global.yaml
Extract retake_budget_percent (default to 20 if not specified)
Extract default_veo_model, default_veo_speed, default_resolution_profile
These defaults are used when a scene does not specify its own values

step.name: Calculate Per-Scene Costs
step.description: Calculate the estimated cost for each scene based on its tool, model, resolution, and call count.

actions.action: For each scene in the scene manifest: 1. Resolve the tool, model, speed, resolution (use scene-level overrides, fall back to global defaults) 2. Look up the unit cost: pricing[tool][model][speed][resolution] 3. For per-second tools (VEO): scene_cost = call_count * duration * cost_per_second 4. For per-call tools (Nano Banana/Imagen): scene_cost = call_count * cost_per_call 5. For per-character tools (ElevenLabs/Chirp): scene_cost = (character_count / 1000) * cost_per_1000_chars 6. Store: {scene_id, tool, model, resolution, call_count, cost_per_unit, scene_cost}

step.name: Calculate Tool Totals
step.description: Aggregate costs by tool to show where budget is concentrated.

actions.action: Group all scene costs by tool name

For each tool, compute: - total_calls: sum of call_count across all scenes using this tool - total_cost: sum of scene_cost across all scenes using this tool - percentage_of_total: (total_cost / base_total) * 100

step.name: Calculate Retake Buffer
step.description: Apply the retake budget percentage from global.yaml to the base estimate.

actions.action: base_total = sum of all scene_cost values
retake_buffer = base_total * (retake_budget_percent / 100)
estimated_total = base_total + retake_buffer

step.name: Resolution Alternatives
step.description: Recalculate the full estimate at each resolution tier to show cost comparison.

actions.action: For each resolution tier in [draft, standard, hd, 4k]: 1. Recalculate all scene costs using that tier's pricing 2. If a tool/model does not support a tier, mark as "N/A" for that tier 3. Compute: alt_base = sum of recalculated scene costs 4. Compute: alt_retake_buffer = alt_base * (retake_budget_percent / 100) 5. Compute: alt_total = alt_base + alt_retake_buffer 6. Compute: savings_vs_current = estimated_total - alt_total 7. Store: {tier, base_cost, retake_buffer, total, savings_vs_current}
Present as a comparison table showing the cost at each tier

step.name: Write Estimate File
step.description: Write the structured cost estimate to the output path.

actions.action: Ensure _cost/estimates/ directory exists (create if needed)
Write {episode_id}-estimate.yaml with the schema below

error.action: HALT: "Scene specification not found at episodes/{episode_id}/ssd/scene-spec.yaml. Run /cookie-create-ssd first."
HALT: "Pricing configuration not found at _config/pricing.yaml. This file is required for cost estimation."
WARN: "global.yaml not found. Using default retake_budget_percent of 20%."
WARN: "Tool '{tool}' not found in pricing.yaml. Cost set to $0.00 with warning annotation."
HALT: "SSD has structural issues: {details}. Run /cookie-validate-ssd first."
